features: Paper plates measure approximately 23 cm in diameter
Ideal for serving food at a birthday party, Christmas or New Year's Eve party
Combine with other gold party supplies from Unique Party
description: Product Description Your special occasions, dinner parties, and last-minute get-togethers just got a little easier with our eco-friendly gold paper plates. This affordable pack of gold paper plates is a convenient way to add some majestic gold colour to your wedding, New Year's Eve party, golden wedding anniversary party or Christmas party. These disposable plates also make cleaning up after the party is over really quick and easy. As these plates are 100% plastic free, the great news is they are better for the environment too! Safety Warning No warning applicable
